meta.disclaimer: Synthetic demo fixture. No live surveillance, no real local collection, no operational instruction.

sourceFraming.name: ODNI / NITTF policy and legal resources

feeds.name: Endpoint activity replay (UAM)
feeds.coverage: permitted user activity, sessions, commands, print activity, removable-media actions

feeds.name: File-transfer monitor (DLP)
feeds.coverage: large downloads, archive creation, removable-media writes

feeds.name: Access and privilege logs (IAM)
feeds.coverage: role changes, admin grants, compartment access, unusual access breadth

feeds.name: Security event correlation (SIEM)
feeds.coverage: query logs, repository access, policy exceptions, correlated security events

feeds.name: Process telemetry (EDR)
feeds.coverage: process activity, archive tools, encrypted transfer tools, suspicious timing

feeds.name: Public sanctions and watchlist mirror
feeds.coverage: sanctions references, politically exposed persons, public watchlist records

feeds.name: INTERPOL public notice source
feeds.coverage: public Red Notice context and status clarification

feeds.name: Public media-event stream
feeds.coverage: media mentions, multilingual names, narrative clusters, role or travel reporting

feeds.name: Public conflict/event feed
feeds.coverage: political violence and protest context for location risk

feeds.name: Entity and alias resolver
feeds.coverage: aliases, offices, organizations, identifiers, native-script names

feeds.name: Public social-media OSINT (X / public posts)
feeds.coverage: public posts mentioning target aliases, photo attachments, geolocation hints, multilingual quote tweets

feeds.name: Reverse-image and geolocation enrichment
feeds.coverage: face match against subject reference photos, building / landmark resolution, EXIF and shadow consistency checks

subjects.summary: Self-search activity, financial context, and possible foreign-contact indicators combine into a high-risk counterintelligence review.
subjects.recommendedAction: Escalate to a human counterintelligence reviewer after checking benign explanations and source provenance.

aliases.note: Synthetic privacy label for demo replay.

subjects.summary: Large removable-media writes and unusually broad access cross a review threshold, but protected-disclosure explanations must remain open.
subjects.recommendedAction: Open human and legal review, increase monitoring with minimization, and block automatic accusation.

aliases.note: Synthetic privacy label for demo replay.

subjects.summary: Privileged access, bulk repository activity, and encrypted-transfer tooling require escalation only after audit and legal review.
subjects.recommendedAction: Create an evidence packet, preserve protected-contact alternatives, and seal analyst rationale before referral.

aliases.note: Synthetic privacy label for demo replay.

subjects.summary: Alias resolution links public role changes, INTERPOL AMIA Red Notice context, sanctions references, and media/event deltas into one target watchboard.
subjects.recommendedAction: Generate a daily target brief and alert on new aliases, role changes, travel reporting, or jurisdiction-risk changes.

aliases.note: Primary English-language spelling in public sources.
Name variant used for entity resolution and role-change tracking.
Variant spelling seen in public reporting; requires analyst confirmation.
Native-script alias used for multilingual media matching.
Title-bearing alias. Useful for media clustering, not identity alone.

events.title: Subject searches sensitive CI records about himself
events.body: Synthetic security-event replay: the subject repeatedly searches sensitive counterintelligence indexes for his own name.
events.analyticValue: Shows a pattern a human reviewer should inspect after checking whether self-audits were allowed.

events.title: Financial context added to review packet
events.body: Synthetic enrichment: an unexplained property or financial change is added as context for analyst verification.
events.analyticValue: Adds context, but is weak by itself. It should not trigger escalation without stronger corroboration.

events.title: Removable-media write volume exceeds baseline
events.body: Synthetic file-transfer replay: export volume and removable-media write cadence exceed the peer baseline.
events.analyticValue: Opens a review gate while preserving protected-disclosure and authorized-task explanations.

events.title: Access expands beyond normal task range
events.body: Synthetic access-log delta: repository coverage expands across compartments not normally touched by the peer group.
events.analyticValue: Corroborates the file-transfer signal, but still does not prove intent.

events.title: Admin account touches bulk repository path
events.body: Synthetic access-log replay: a privileged admin account touches a bulk repository path above historical baseline.
events.analyticValue: High-value signal that requires human review and an audit trail before escalation.

events.title: Encrypted-transfer tooling appears near repository activity
events.body: Synthetic process replay: anonymization and encrypted-transfer tools appear near the repository-access window.
events.analyticValue: Supports review, but the analyst must separate risky behavior from protected contact or authorized security work.

events.title: Foreign press cluster references classified material
events.body: Synthetic GDELT-style cluster: multilingual press reporting references program names that match a sensitive internal repository touched in the same window. Public-source only.
events.analyticValue: External press cluster co-occurs with the internal privileged-access window. Analyst should determine whether the public reporting matches authorized-disclosure pathways or warrants CI escalation.

events.title: Reverse-image enrichment · 0.94 document-watermark match
events.body: Synthetic enrichment: published images in the press cluster carry visible structural artifacts that match an internal document-watermark dataset at 0.94 confidence. EXIF stripped; structural fingerprint comes from page-layout and footer-element extraction.
events.analyticValue: Cross-domain corroboration: published material visually matches internal artifact signatures. Raises insider-exfiltration confidence; analyst still verifies provenance before referral.

events.title: INTERPOL AMIA Red Notice context names Ahmad Vahidi
events.body: Official-public source context: Interpol Executive Committee decision endorsed Red Notices for six individuals, including Ahmad Vahidi, in the AMIA case.
events.analyticValue: Strong public-source watchlist context for the target profile and evidence packet.

events.title: INTERPOL clarification prevents overclaiming
events.body: Official-public context: Red Notice is a wanted-persons alert, not an international arrest warrant; useful language for analyst packet precision.
events.analyticValue: Adds precise legal language so the brief does not overstate what a Red Notice means.

events.title: Sanctions context links Vahidi and MODAFL
events.body: Synthetic watchlist mirror links public sanctions context, Ministry of Defense role, and entity aliases for analyst review.
events.analyticValue: Public watchlist context plus official role history increases target-profile confidence.

events.title: Media cluster reports possible travel
events.body: Synthetic GDELT-style cluster: multilingual media references travel/meeting context; analyst packet flags jurisdiction-risk review, not operational instruction.
events.analyticValue: Useful as a watch item only. The system recommends monitoring until an official source corroborates it.

events.title: Reported role change updates relationship graph
events.body: Synthetic media delta: role/title mention changes relationship strength between target, IRGC command, and advisory network nodes.
events.analyticValue: Adds a daily-brief update because the target network may have changed.

events.title: New name variant needs analyst confirmation
events.body: Synthetic SPARQL/entity-resolution delta: transliteration variant reaches 0.78 confidence after co-occurring title and role tokens.
events.analyticValue: New alias detected. A human analyst should confirm it before merging the name into the main target record.

events.title: Public X post tagged with native-script alias · photo attached
events.body: Synthetic public post: caption uses احمد وحیدی plus a meeting-context phrase; photo attached. Treated as a watch-only signal until reverse-image enrichment or another OSINT family corroborates.
events.analyticValue: Public-post mention of a sanctioned alias triggers a reverse-image enrichment pass. The post itself is not authoritative.

events.title: Reverse-image enrichment · 0.87 face match · 0.91 building match
events.body: Synthetic enrichment: face-entity match to reference photos at 0.87 confidence. Background building matched to a public Caracas dataset at 0.91. Shadow direction and time-of-day consistent. EXIF stripped — no direct GPS data.
events.analyticValue: Enrichment raises identity confidence and proposes a Caracas location hint. Analyst should corroborate with another OSINT family before updating the brief.

alerts.title: High-risk CI review recommended
alerts.reason: Self-search behavior and financial context are corroborated across endpoint activity and security-event replay.
alerts.recommendedAction: Validate benign explanations, then export a counterintelligence referral packet.
alerts.monitoring: Increase monitoring until CI referral packet is accepted

alerts.title: Removable-media review gate opened
alerts.reason: File-transfer and access-log replay show export-volume and access-breadth changes; protected-disclosure explanations remain plausible.
alerts.recommendedAction: Open human and legal review; do not label the subject as malicious without analyst confirmation.
alerts.monitoring: Increase monitoring with minimization; no automatic accusation

alerts.title: Privileged-access packet needs audit seal
alerts.reason: Privileged repository activity and encrypted-transfer tooling appear in the same window.
alerts.recommendedAction: Generate evidence packet, preserve protected-contact alternatives, and seal analyst rationale before referral.
alerts.monitoring: Increase monitoring and preserve protected-contact alternative

alerts.title: External corroboration: leaked material visible in foreign press
alerts.reason: GDELT press cluster co-occurs with the internal privileged-access window; reverse-image enrichment matches published material to internal document watermarks at 0.94.
alerts.recommendedAction: Hold escalation pending audit seal; verify whether the press exposure matches an authorized-disclosure pathway before treating as exfiltration.
alerts.monitoring: Continue endpoint monitoring; track press-cluster spread and additional watermark matches

alerts.title: Watchlist context confirmed
alerts.reason: INTERPOL AMIA context, Red Notice clarification, and sanctions references corroborate the target profile.
alerts.recommendedAction: Keep in daily target brief and alert a target analyst on travel, role, or jurisdiction-risk changes.
alerts.monitoring: Continuous OSINT watchboard and daily brief

alerts.title: New alias needs confirmation
alerts.reason: A new name variant crossed the review threshold after matching role and title context.
alerts.recommendedAction: Require analyst confirmation before merging it into the primary target record.

alerts.title: Reported travel cluster needs corroboration
alerts.reason: Media mentions suggest travel or meeting context, but reliability remains low until an official source confirms it.
alerts.recommendedAction: Increase watchboard monitoring; do not treat media reporting as operational tasking.
alerts.monitoring: Monitor travel cluster until official corroboration

alerts.title: Public photo proposes new location
alerts.reason: A public X post and reverse-image enrichment together propose a Caracas location at 0.87 face / 0.91 building confidence. Not corroborated by an official source.
alerts.recommendedAction: Have an analyst verify the face match against reference photos and corroborate the location with GDELT or ACLED before updating the daily brief.
alerts.monitoring: Watch for follow-on posts and corroborating media for the same location

packet.title: Daily Target Brief: Ahmad Vahidi Watchboard
sections: Analyst caveats and next collection questions
